title: stipa eriocaulis subsp. kiemii
intro: Stipa eriocaulis subsp. kiemii, also known as Kiem's stipa or Kiem's feather grass, is a type of flowering plant in the family Poaceae. This perennial grass has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Stipa eriocaulis subsp. kiemii include soothing and calming effects on the digestive system and respiratory tract, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
